summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement public service announcement: stock B-roll (DHS flag, fingerprint, INA document, child raising hand) under large captions, with a voiceover reading who must register under the Immigration and Nationality Act and Trump's directive. It is captioned and uses narration, with no music track. On-screen text reads 'Immigration and Nationality', 'is making sure all aliens comply', 'when you applied for a U.S. visa', 'you need to make sure they register too', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: Immigration and Nationality; is making sure all aliens comply; when you applied for a U.S. visa; you need to make sure they register too; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
